imposter_hint: A person who travels beyond Earth
A vessel that travels deep underwater

A very strong concentrated hot drink
A quiet building full of stories and books
A bubbly drink reserved for special occasions
A tall structure that spins in the breeze
A bag carried on your back on a journey
The sky turns orange as the day ends
The hardest natural substance, often given as a gift
Frames worn on the face to sharpen vision

You open it above your head when it rains

A stringed instrument played with fingers or a pick
A black and white bird that swims but cannot fly
A tower that guides ships at night with light

A tall pink bird that stands on one leg
A mountain that occasionally spews fire and rock
